client_context: Client is a mid-size U.S. tech company buying a production data-integration service that will process customer personal data. Procurement requires visibility into hosting location/cross-border transfer basis and certified deletion at exit; absence of those details should be escalated. The production service will process customer personal data across hosted systems. Procurement requires certified deletion evidence when customer data exits the service.
instruction: Review the vendor MSA against the playbook. Flag deviations with exact quotes, propose fallback text where required, and escalate missing information.
